description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The front facade includes a central door flanked by two sets of rectangular windows with brown frames, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The side elevations each have a single set of windows, while the rear facade has a pair of windows, all matching in style and proportion. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, creating modest eaves for weather protection. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light tone, likely stucco or plaster over masonry. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements, porches, or steps, emphasizing function and simplicity.
description: A simple, single-story house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a central front door. The exterior is light-colored with brown-framed windows and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central door and two sets of brown-framed windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the steep gable roof and a single set of windows centered on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a pair of brown-framed windows, lacking a door or additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two sets of windows, mirroring the front's window arrangement but without a door.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with no porch or steps, flanked by windows and sheltered by a modest roof overhang.
